Meta.title: Sophium
Meta.description: Multi-agent philosophy chat grounded in the SEP

Home.title: To get started, edit the page.tsx file.
Home.intro: Try the <chat>chat UI demo</chat>. Looking for a starting point or more instructions? Head over to <templates>Templates</templates> or the <learn>Learning</learn> center.

Chat.blurb: Using only Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy (SEP) entries, multi-step Gemini agents assemble an answer (fetch → answer → review → final). From heuristic-filtered candidates you may optionally select the primary person entry the pipeline should lean on.
Chat.loading: Processing: fetching SEP entries, then answer, review, and final pass (this can take dozens of seconds)…
Chat.reviewWarning: The automatic review did not fully pass. Treat the answer with care.
Chat.placeholder: Ask about philosophers’ views, definitions, or topics covered in the SEP…
